en: low in protein and high in fiber that pandas can't digest well.
Yet, bamboo comprises 99% of a panda's diet.
To compensate, pandas need to eat 20 to 40 pounds a day.
ko: 이를 보충하려면 판다는 하루에 20~40파운드를 먹어야 한다.

en: Pandas have quite a bit in common with carnivores.
A panda's digestive system is more closely related to that of a carnivore than an herbivore,
ko: 판다의 소화기관은 초식동물보다 육식동물의 소화기관과 더 가깝고,

en: which explains why they don't digest plants very well.
Fortunately, they have other adaptations that help them chow down on bamboo stalks,
ko: 다행히도 판다에게는 대나무 줄기를 잘 씹어 먹게 해 주는 다른 적응도 있는데,

en: When they're not eating, pandas rest, and rest, and poop, and poop.
ko: 먹지 않을 때 판다는 쉬고, 또 쉬고, 배설하고, 또 배설한다.

en: Since they don't digest bamboo very well, pandas end up passing a lot of it as waste,
ko: 대나무를 잘 소화하지 못하기 때문에 판다는 그중 많은 부분을 배설물로 내보내고,

en: which unsurprisingly contains a lot of undigested bamboo bits.
